title: Farm Animals Toys for Kids with 120x80cm large Play Mat,38 Piece Farm Toys Play Sets with Jumbo Animals Figures,Tractor Toy and Farm Tools,Educational Farm Role Play for Kids 3 4 5 Years Olds
features: Interactive Farm Family Playset:Round up the family for hands-on farm fun!Tend to 14 animal toys,build fences,haul hay bales and vegetables on the tractor trailer,or other farm work on large activity playmat. Designed to inspire endless farm adventures

Farm Animals World:This farm toys contains 14 pieces different size lifelike animal figurines from 4 to 13cm cow,sheep,horse,donkey,goat,cattle,pig,dog,rabbit,cat,rooster,duck,goose with finely hand painted.Durable plastic animals for immersive role play

Large Farm Play Rug:Made of premium non-woven fabric which is softer than thin PVC. Our 120x80cm large activity mat allow 2 to 4 kids to spark imagination and foster social play in farm animals world,while also being foldable for easy storage after play

Spark Creativity and Learning:Made from durable ABS materials with no sharp edges. Kids can design their own farm layouts and enjoy hours of fun learning this farm animals knowledge.This educational playset doubles as cake toppers,decor and collectible

Desirable Present for Kids:Sunset teaches tidy up time!Childs farm includes a handy carrying bucket keeps toy animals and accessories organized for mess-free play indoors and outdoors. A favorite for kids 3 4 5 year olds birthdays,holidays and any party
